leadText: The Shed Shell (Japanese: きれいなぬけがら Pretty Shed Shell) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It allows the holder to switch out regardless of trapping moves and Abilities.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Allows the holder to switch out (but not flee or Teleport ) even if it is under the effect of a trapping move or Ability . The Shed Shell allows the holder to switch out regardless of even self-inflicted effects, such as Ingrain .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A tough, discarded carapace to be held by a Pokémon. It enables the holder to switch with a waiting Pokémon in battle. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. This discarded carapace enables the holder to switch out of battle without fail. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. Hard and sturdy, this discarded carapace enables the holder to switch out of battle without fail.
